tasks.name: graph_diameter
count_cut_vertices
weighted_median_stop
tasks.py:
def weighted_median_stop(spec: dict) -> str:
    """First stop along the route where the distance already travelled reaches at least half the total route length."""
    stops = spec["stops"]
    lengths = spec["lengths"]
    total = sum(lengths)
    cum = 0
    for i, s in enumerate(stops):
        if 2 * cum >= total:
            return s
        cum += lengths[i]
    return stops[-1]

tasks.name: cycle_length
tasks.py:
def cycle_length(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Follow the single successor of each node from start; return the length of the cycle eventually entered."""
    succ = spec["succ"]
    cur = spec["start"]
    order = {}
    step = 0
    while cur not in order:
        order[cur] = step
        step += 1
        cur = succ[cur]
    return step - order[cur]
